project: PRJ03119 - Archer - Archer - Blackburn - Unknown - NA
comment: No further requirement for READ supplied engineer

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Unable to pass +- 4000 during drift run seems being stuck in the sidepocket. Slb plan is to run a 3" flexidrift. MFC40 being delayed to this afternoon depending on the progress.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Plan forward is to try bleed off into a donor well and see if clears debris, then try inject again. Rig up timing for MFC TBC. If logging delays further, in line with arrival of replacement batteries on board, the plan will be to get these tested in line with SIF00228 to determine the best one to run for the job.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Replacement MIT fingers received. Slickline ran Shallow Drift with 4.65" Gauge Cutter and sat down @87ft. Hand jarred, injected the well and reached 902ft. Tried to inject the well again but unable to, most likely packed off by scale. Latest lookahead has rig up MFC tomorrow 11am, but depends on plan forward. TBC.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Confirmed no FTA requirements for HBA-22. Rig up MFC40 probably early hours of the morning. Plan is to log up to surface, positioning the MFC in the riser above the Wellhead/below slickline BOPs and wait for the fingers to close before shut-in/bleed off. This will reduce the need for downward movement. Extra care to be taken when rigging down.

project: PRJ00224 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9861 - PLT_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Crew back to base at 17:00. Equipment due to be shipped once plug is set and job is completed. Probably in another 2 days.

project: PRJ03266 - Well Services Group (Exlog) - Exlog (WSG) - WRF-2 - GR_CCL
comment: Abdil travelled back to Aberdeen via Heathrow on Saturday 2nd May, organised through READ/QA. Flight delayed which required an overnight - Heathrow to Aberdeen on Sunday morning.

project: PRJ02707 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-4838_T-4850_T-5654_T-6238 - PLT
comment: Lukotrans will ship the goods with the next groupage trailer to NL. Rough ETA back at Openfield - beginning of next week
